description: PR adds two NEW files sharing an identical ~50-token retry_with_backoff function (copy-paste drift). jscpd --min-tokens 50 detects a clone introduced by this PR (both copies are added by the diff, neither pre-exists on base). v2 anti-slop gate -> verdict=blocked reason=new_clone_block, LLM swarm skipped. new_clone_block is tunable in block_on; demote to advisory if CRB F1 regresses.
